sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_edges (id UInt64, edge_index UInt64, coordinates Array(Array(Float64)));
SELECT id, edge_index, coordinates FROM geo_edges WHERE edge_index NOT IN (SELECT edge_index FROM geo_edges WHERE coordinates[1][1] IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY edge_index;
SELECT edge_index, COUNT(*) as boundary_count FROM geo_edges GROUP BY edge_index HAVING boundary_count NOT IN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geo_edges WHERE coordinates[1][1] IS NULL);
CREATE TABLE temp_edges AS SELECT * FROM geo_edges WHERE edge_index NOT IN (SELECT edge_index FROM geo_edges WHERE edge_index < 0);
SELECT edge_index, h3GetUnidirectionalEdgeBoundary(edge_index) AS boundary FROM geo_edges WHERE edge_index NOT IN (SELECT edge_index FROM temp_edges) ORDER BY boundary[1][1] DESC;
INSERT INTO geo_edges VALUES (3, CAST('1248204388774707197' AS UInt64), h3GetUnidirectionalEdgeBoundary(CAST('1248204388774707197' AS UInt64))), (4, 0, h3GetUnidirectionalEdgeBoundary(0));
SELECT edge_index, h3GetUnidirectionalEdgeBoundary(edge_index) NOT IN (SELECT coordinates FROM geo_edges WHERE id = 2) AS is_boundary_valid FROM geo_edges WHERE edge_index IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT edge_index, h3GetUnidirectionalEdgeBoundary(edge_index) FROM geo_edges WHERE edge_index NOT IN (1, 2, 3.5)) AS boundaries_grouped HAVING count > 0;
